name: Garlic & Mint Yogurt Marinade (Lf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lemon juice, minced garlic, lowfat yogurt, paprika, and chopped mint in a large bowl.
2. Add the chicken breasts to the bowl and toss until evenly coated with the marinade.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for several hours (at least 2-4 hours) to allow the flavors to meld and the chicken to absorb the marinade.
4. Before serving, broil the marinated chicken in a preheated oven at a high temperature until it is heated through and lightly browned. Serve immediately.
